questions.question_text: A sum of ₹12,000 is invested at 10% per annum, compound interest, compounded half-yearly. What is the amount after 1.5 years?
The marked price of a machine is ₹16,000. The shopkeeper gives two successive discounts of 15% and N% to the customer. If the customer paid ₹12,240 for the machine, the value of N is:
Simplify $\frac{8.16}{2.4} + (3.64 \times 1.5)$ to two decimal places.
In a class, the ratio of students who passed to those who failed is 11:2. If 44 students failed, what is the total number of students in the class?
The sum of two positive numbers is 31 and their product is 220. The positive difference between them is:
A person covers a certain distance. If he reduces his speed by 25%, by what percentage does the time taken to cover the same distance increase? (Rounded off to two decimal places)
The present age of Mohit is three times the present age of his son Rahul. After 12 years from now, Mohit's age will be twice Rahul's age. What is the sum of their present ages (in years)?

A local library purchased several biography books and mystery novels for their new collection. The ratio of biography books to mystery novels is 7:6 and the total is 91 mystery novels. Each biography book costs ₹40 more than a mystery novel. The library was able to buy 15 more mystery novels than biography books. Find the number of biography books purchased.
The diagonals of a rhombus are in the ratio 3:4. If the length of each side of the rhombus is 12.5 units, what is the length of the shorter diagonal?
A trader buys an article, spends ₹50 on its repair, and sells it for ₹600, making a 25% profit. What was the original purchase price?
If a trapezium has bases of lengths 8 cm and 12 cm, and height of 5 cm, what is its area?

In a batch of 50 managers and supervisors, the average monthly salary of managers is ₹48,000 and that of supervisors is ₹42,000. If the overall monthly average salary of the batch is ₹45,000, find the number of supervisors in the batch.
Simplify: $(\frac{19}{18} \div \frac{19}{6}) \div (\frac{5}{18} \times \frac{16}{15} + \frac{4}{6}) + \frac{6}{8} \times \frac{24}{25} \text{ of } \frac{25}{8}$
A mobile phone is marked at ₹8,000. If two successive discounts of 15% and 10% are given, what is the selling price?
If $2 \cot A = 4$, find the value of $\frac{\operatorname{cosec}^{2} A+1}{\operatorname{cosec}^{2} A-1}$
If the third proportional to 0.8 and 5.6 is n, then what is the value of n?
The value of $(18 \div (24 \div (3 \text{ of } 2)) \times 4) - 10$ is equal to:
The ratio of the heights of Shyam and Manish is 7: 8. If Shyam's height is 140 cm, who is taller and by how much?
A and B can do a piece of work in 12 days and 28 days, respectively. Both work for 3 days and then A leaves. How long (in days) will B take to complete the remaining work?
The net percentage of a trouser is first increased by 20% and then decreased by 25%. What is the net percentage change in the price?
A car travels 120 km at 60 km/h, 180 km at 60 km/h, and 100 km at 50 km/h. What is the average speed of the car for the entire journey?
If a car travels 120 km using 8 liters of petrol, how much petrol will be required to travel 225 km?

Three friends, Amit, Bharat, and Chitra, can individually complete a painting project in 12 hours, 18 hours, and 24 hours, respectively. If they all work together for 4 hours and then Amit leaves, how many hours will Bharat and Chitra take to finish the remaining work?
The sides of a triangle are in the ratio 5:6:7 and its perimeter is 90 cm. What is the area of the triangle (in square cm)?
What is the mode of the following data: 12, 15, 18, 18, 20, 18, 22, 22, 25, 28, 22, 15, 18, 12?
Two successive price increases of 15% and 15% on an article are equivalent to a single percentage increase of:
An investment triples in 6 years under compound interest. After how many years will it become 27 times?
If the ratio of two numbers is 3 : 8, and their HCF is 6, then their LCM is:
A two-digit number is such that four times the sum of its digits is equal to the number formed by reversing its digits. If the difference between the digits is 3, find the original number.
A trader buys 20 kg of rice for ₹1,000 and sells it at ₹55 per kg. What is the profit percentage?
The Ikshvakus ruled Krishna-Godavari delta in Eastern Deccan after the decline of which dynasty?

Which of the following Articles of the Constitution of India states that, until Parliament by law otherwise provides, the quorum to constitute a meeting of either House of Parliament shall be one-tenth of the total number of members of the House?
What is the term used for the first matra in Hindustani music's tala system?
The component inside the CPU responsible for arithmetic operations and logical comparisons is the _______.
Two isotopes of an element have 17 protons and 18 neutrons and 20 neutrons, respectively. Which of the following is the correct representation of these isotopes?
'Bihu' is considered the festival of the ________ state/UT.

Which statement is True or False about the first and second generations of computers?(i) The First Generation used Vacuum Tubes, which were bulky and heat-generating.(ii) The Transistor, which defined the Second Generation, made computers larger, slower, and more expensive.

options.text: Coordinating hardware and running core system processes

questions.question_text: Which function is primarily handled by system software in a computer system?

options.text: Low-pressure systems over warm ocean water

questions.question_text: Tropical cyclones form mainly due to:
Under how many broad categories are the Fundamental Rights guaranteed by the Constitution of India?
Pragati Maidan in Delhi is most closely associated with which form of communication?
Which Indian author was shortlisted for the 2025 Booker Prize for the novel 'The Loneliness of Sonia and Sunny'?
Which of the following footballers was awarded a Guinness World Record in 2025 for the most wins in international football?
What were the volunteer groups of the Prati Sarkar called?
Which of the following is a common symptom of diabetes mellitus?
The excessive presence of _______ mainly causes eutrophication in lakes.

options.text: Free market capitalism with minimal state intervention
Traditional agrarian structure without structural reforms
Mixed economy combining public and private sectors

questions.question_text: After gaining independence, what type of economic system did India implement as its development strategy?
According to the Natyashastra, which of the following is characterised by body movements to music without expressions (Abhinay)?

As per Haj Policy 2025, out of the total number of quota allocated to the Government of India (GoI), how many seats for the Haj Committee of India (HCoI) and Haj Group Organisers (HGOs), respectively?

options.text: It limits industrial expansion by diverting funds from core economic sectors
It increases regional isolation by reducing interaction among different areas
It links production centres with markets, enhancing trade and economic activity
It primarily serves elite passenger travel without influencing economic output

questions.question_text: Which statement best explains why transport and communication infrastructure are vital for India's economic growth?

options.text: Change in direction due to gravity

questions.question_text: Which of the following properties is responsible for the bending of light when it moves from air into water?
Who among the following won the Australian Open in 2025?
Which dynasty of the Delhi Sultanate is known for introducing the "Iqta system"?
Which of the following tree species sustains the famous handicrafts of Kashmir and grows mainly in the Himalayan region?
In December 2025, which of the following cybersecurity solutions providers introduced an advanced tenant control feature for ChatGPT?
As of September 2025, according to the structure of the Central Administrative Tribunal, how many benches are there across India?
During the $17^{\text{th}}$ BRICS Summit held in 2025, which country officially joined the bloc as a full member?
Which resolution is the Preamble of the Constitution based on, drafted by Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru?
The People's Plan Campaign, introduced nationwide in 2018, aimed to strengthen rural governance through which of the following approaches?
The statement "A computer can work tirelessly and consistently for long periods without losing concentration" represents which characteristics of the computer?
Which Dravidian language is spoken outside India in Baluchistan?

options.text: Abuse of duty-free trade privileges granted by imperial farmans
Capture of Calcutta and attack on British factories by Siraj-ud-Daulah
Expansion of Maratha administrative reforms affecting coastal trade
Refusal of the English Company to conduct inland trade in Bengal

questions.question_text: Which event directly triggered the British-Bengal confrontation that culminated in the Battle of Plassey (1757)?
In January 2025, India became the fourth nation to achieve autonomous satellite docking in orbit. What was the name of this mission?

In September 2025, which state government allotted 480 acres of land to Adani Infra (India) Ltd. for a Modified Partner of Google-owned Raiden Infotech India, for establishing 1 GW AI Data Centres in the state?

options.text: Cutting down reliance on renewable energy sources
Feeding 1.4 billion people while improving farmers' incomes

questions.question_text: Which key national challenge served as the primary focus of the National Agricultural Policy (NAP) introduced in 2000?

options.text: By the members of the Vidhan Sabha

questions.question_text: In which of the following ways is the Speaker of the Vidhan Sabha elected?
A quantity is measured in meters per second squared ($m/s^2$). What is this quantity?
Which type of Emergency could be implemented due to 'internal disturbance' before the 44th Amendment of the Indian Constitution?
The assassination attempt on Viceroy Lord Hardinge in Delhi in 1912 was organised by revolutionaries led by:
Which type of agriculture is commonly practiced in densely populated monsoon regions of Asia?
Which of the following letter-number clusters will replace the question mark (?) in the given series to make it logically complete? DMC 6 JNBF 12 PSFI 18 VXJL 24 BCNO ?

Seven people A, B, D, J, O, T and Z are sitting in a row, facing north. Only three people sit to the left of B. Only Z sits to the right of T. Only three people sit between T and O. J sits at one place to the left of A but at some place to the right of D. Who sits immediately to the right of B?

Seven boxes B, C, D, E, Q, R and S are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. No box is kept below C. Only two boxes are kept between E and C. Only Q is kept at some place above B but at some place below R. Which box is kept immediately above S?

Seven boxes G, H, I, L, M, N and O, are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. No box is kept above O. Only three boxes are kept between G and H. Only three boxes are kept between H and L. N is kept immediately above I. Only four boxes are kept between L and I. G is kept at some place above O. Which box is kept second above G?

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)
What will come in place of '?' in the following equation, if '+' and '-' are interchanged and 'x' and '÷' are interchanged? $14 \times 2 - 12 + 4 \div 8 = ?$

In a certain code language,A @ B means 'A is the father of B'.A & B means 'A is the wife of B'.A % B means 'A is the mother of B', andA £ B means 'A is the brother of B'.Based on the above, how is B related to X if H @ B & C % O @ P £ X?

Each of the digits in the number 4317856 is arranged in ascending order from left to right and then each of the first and second from left are second from the left and second from the right in the new number thus formed?
Select the triad which follows the same pattern as that followed by the two triads given below. Both triads follow the same pattern. JM - NQ - RU BE - FL - IM
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? GNI JRL MVO PZR ?
What should come in place of '?' in the given series? 372 321 277 240 210 187 ?

In the following number pairs, the second number is obtained by applying certain mathematical operations to the first number. Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets. (NOTE: Operations should be performed on whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into their constituent digits. E.g. 13 - Operations on 13 such as adding / subtracting / multiplying etc. to 13. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.) 123, 116 102, 95

Read the given statement(s) and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statement(s) is true, even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statement(s). Statements: All rooms are rings. No bedroom is lamp. Conclusions: (I) Some lamps are rings. (II) All rings are lamps.

Based on the English alphabetical order, three of the following four letter-cluster pairs are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter-cluster.)

Read the given statement(s) and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statement(s) is true, even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statement(s). Statements: All kings are mountains. All mountains are arrows. Conclusion (I): Some mountains are kings. Conclusion (II): All kings are arrows.

Based on the alphabetical order, three of the following four are alike in a certain way and thus form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group? (Note: The odd one out is not based on the number of consonants/vowels or their position in the letter cluster.)

Bhavesh starts from point A and drives 19 km towards the east. He then takes a left turn, drives 16 km, turns left and drives 23 km. He then takes a left turn and drives 18 km. He then takes a final left turn, drives 4 km and stops at Point P. How far (shortest distance) and in which direction is Point P with respect to in order to reach Point A again? (All turns are 90-degree turns only unless specified.)
Select the pair that follows the same pattern as that followed by the two pairs given below. Both pairs follow the same pattern. RQO : UKF OLF : JMH
Each of the digits in the number 7543168 is arranged in ascending order from left to right and then how many digits in the new number thus formed?

Each letter in the word COMPLEX is changed to the letter immediately preceding it in the English alphabetical order and then all the letters thus formed are arranged in alphabetical order. Which of the following letters will be fourth from the right in the new group of letters thus formed?
In a certain code language, 'LEST' is coded as '7453' and 'LOTS' is coded as '2735'. What is the code for 'O' in the given code language?

Refer to the given number series and answer the question that follows. All numbers are single-digit numbers only. Counting to be done from left to right only. (Left) 2 7 5 6 8 4 1 5 3 2 8 6 4 7 6 2 5 8 1 9 3 4 6 5 8 2 7 (Right) How many such odd digits are there which are immediately preceded by a perfect square and immediately followed by an odd digit? (NOTE: 1 is also a perfect square.)

Each vowel in the word ANTIQUE is changed to the letter immediately following it in the English alphabetical order and each consonant is changed to the letter immediately preceding it in the English alphabetical order. Which of the following letters will be second from the left in the new group of letters thus formed?

In a certain code language,A @ B means 'A is the father of B'.A & B means 'A is the wife of B'.A % B means 'A is the mother of B', andA £ B means 'A is the brother of B'.How is E related to Y if E @ N @ T % R & Y?
LOOK is related to SVXR in a certain way based on the English alphabetical order. In the same way, ILNH is related to PSUO. To which of the following is FIKE related, following the same logic?
In a certain code language, 'CANE' is coded as '5731' and 'RACE' is coded as '7435'. What is the code for 'R' in the given code language?

Seven boxes A, B, C, D, E, F and G are kept one over the other but not necessarily in the same order. No box is kept above G. Only three boxes are kept between G and D. Only two boxes are kept between E and B. B is kept immediately below D. Only four boxes are kept between L and C. E is kept at some place above A'. Which box is kept immediately before D?
What should come in place of '?' in the given series? 71 68 ? 53 41 26
What should come in place of '?' in the given series based on the English alphabetical order? ACE HJL OQS VXZ ?

Seven people F, G, H, L, M, O and Q are sitting around a circular table, facing the centre of the table. O sits the immediate right of Q. F sits to the immediate right of H. Only two people sit between Q and O when counted from the right of Q. Only three people sit between H and G when counted from the right of Q. How many people sit between F and L when counted from the right of F?
